title: cristonia biloba
intro: Cristonia biloba, also known as Ginkgo biloba, is a unique and ancient plant species, often referred to as a "living fossil," due to its ability to thrive for millions of years with minimal changes. The medicinal properties of Ginkgo biloba lie in its ability to improve blood circulation, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Ginkgo biloba include improved memory and cognitive function, enhanced blood flow to the brain, and reduced risk of age-related diseases such as Alzheimer's and dementia. Ginkgo biloba can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
